SEARCH
Package com.example.helios.model

Class EventComment

java.lang.Object
com.example.helios.model.EventComment
public class EventComment extends Object
Represents a comment made on a specific event. Stores details about the author, the message content, and interaction metrics (likes/pins).

Role in the application: allows Entrants and Organizers to discuss and ask questions about an event.

  • Constructor Details

    • EventComment

      public EventComment()
      Default constructor required for Firestore deserialization.

    • EventComment

      public EventComment(String commentId, String eventId, String authorUid, String authorNameSnapshot, @Nullable String authorProfileImageUrlSnapshot, String body, @Nullable String parentCommentId, long createdAtMillis, long updatedAtMillis, int likeCount, boolean isDeleted, boolean pinned)
      Constructs a new EventComment with specified attributes.
      Parameters:
      commentId - The unique identifier for the comment.
      eventId - The unique identifier for the associated event.
      authorUid - The unique identifier of the user authoring the comment.
      authorNameSnapshot - A snapshot of the author's name at the time of creation.
      authorProfileImageUrlSnapshot - A snapshot of the author's profile image URL at creation time.
      body - The text body of the comment.
      parentCommentId - The ID of the parent comment, or null if it's a top-level comment.
      createdAtMillis - Creation timestamp in epoch millis.
      updatedAtMillis - Last updated timestamp in epoch millis.
      likeCount - Number of likes this comment has received.
      isDeleted - Whether this comment has been marked as deleted (e.g. for moderation).
      pinned - Whether this comment is pinned to the top of the event's thread.

  • Method Details

    • getCommentId

      public String getCommentId()
      Returns:
      The unique identifier of this comment.

    • setCommentId

      public void setCommentId(String commentId)

      Returns:
      The unique identifier of the associated event.

      Returns:

      Returns:
      The unique identifier of the parent comment, or null.

      public int getLikeCount()
      Returns:
      The current number of likes.

      public void setLikeCount(int likeCount)
      Parameters:
      likeCount - Sets the like count, guaranteeing it won't be negative.

    • isDeleted

      public boolean isDeleted()
      Returns:
      True if the comment is marked as deleted/moderated.

    • setDeleted

      public void setDeleted(boolean deleted)
      Parameters:
      deleted - True if the comment is marked as deleted/moderated.

    • isPinned

      public boolean isPinned()
      Returns:
      True if the comment is pinned by an organizer.

    • setPinned

      public void setPinned(boolean pinned)
      Parameters:
      pinned - True if the comment is pinned.

    • isTopLevel

      public boolean isTopLevel()
      Returns:
      True if this is a top-level comment (has no parent ID).
